S01.name: Tech Minimal
S01.description: Tech minimal style, clean and sleek interface design

S02.name: Minimalist Monochrome
S02.description: Minimalist black and white editorial style, emphasizing typography and contrast

S03.name: Mondrian / De Stijl
S03.description: Mondrian style, geometric color blocks and straight lines composition

S04.name: Swiss / International Typographic
S04.description: Swiss International Typographic style, grid systems and sans-serif typography

S05.name: Brutalist
S05.description: Brutalist, raw, bold, and unadorned design

S06.name: Cyberpunk
S06.description: Cyberpunk, neon lights and futuristic tech aesthetic

S07.name: Retro 80s (Synthwave)
S07.description: 80s retro synthwave, gradient neons and grid patterns

S08.name: Retro 60s–70s (Print Grain)
S08.description: 60s-70s print style, vintage colors and grain texture

S09.name: Memphis
S09.description: Memphis design, geometric shapes and vibrant colors

S10.name: Luxury Editorial
S10.description: Luxury editorial style, elegant serif fonts and refined typography

S11.name: Japanese Minimal
S11.description: Japanese minimalism, white space aesthetics and zen design

S12.name: Nature Organic
S12.description: Natural organic style, soft curves and earth tone colors

S13.name: Material-ish
S13.description: Material Design style, shadow layers and color systems

S14.name: Glassmorphism
S14.description: Glassmorphism, frosted glass effects and transparent layers

S15.name: Neumorphism
S15.description: Neumorphism design, soft shadows and embossed effects

S16.name: Terminal / Hacker
S16.description: Terminal style, green text and hacker aesthetic

S17.name: Bauhaus Modernism
S17.description: Bauhaus style, geometric forms and functional design

S18.name: Retro Pixel UI
S18.description: Retro Pixel UI style, 8-bit aesthetic with pixel grid and dither vibes
